name: EMC Possible Ransomware Detection
description: Detects suspicious data activity on EMC storage devices, potentially indicative of ransomware. This rule identifies a high volume of file modifications (more than 200) by a single user, excluding write operations with zero bytes written.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious data activity on EMC storage, possibly indicating ransomware, detected. High volume of file modifications by a single user. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **User SID** {user_sid}, **Client IP** {client_ip}, **Number of File Modifications** {handle}, **File Path** {file_path}, **File Name** {file_name}. Investigate this critical event immediately to confirm ransomware infection and initiate incident response.

parameters.name: user_sid
parameters.description: The Security Identifier (SID) of the user performing the file modifications.

parameters.name: client_ip
parameters.description: The client IP address initiating the file modifications.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: The count of file modifications by the user.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The path of the file being modified.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file being modified.
